title: 7 Herbal Creams For Hangover
description: Cinchona officinalis creams contains compounds like quinine and cinchonine, which have anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. These properties help reduce swelling and pain in the head, common symptoms of a hangover. Quinine also has a diuretic effect, which can help remove excess fluids and waste from the body, further alleviating hangover symptoms.
